text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, August 11. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's get that resolved. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hosted a game night at our place. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted the plans. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Healthy choices are great. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. That's a big step. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
